name: Beef and Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in the pressure cooker over medium-high heat. Add the meat and cook uncovered, stirring occasionally until well browned, about 6 to 8 minutes. Sprinkle with the flour and cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
2. Add the leek, beef stock, tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and basil. Cover and bring to high pressure. Once at high pressure, reduce heat to stabilize the pressure and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Release the pressure by running cold water over the cover. Open the lid carefully. Add the carrots and celery. Replace the lid and return the cooker to high pressure. Reduce heat and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Release the remaining pressure, open the lid, and stir in the peas. Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
